---
title: "Thornforest Hydrology & Water Quality"
toc: false
---

How have **water quantity and quality** changed across the lower Rio Grande region over the last
25 years — and do those changes line up with **thornscrub restoration**? These pages compile and
explore publicly available hydrological and water-quality data for three South Texas HUC-8
watersheds, as part of the [American Forests](https://www.americanforests.org/) **Thornforest**
project.

::: {.callout-note}
## The study area
Three HUC-8 subbasins: **South Laguna Madre** (12110208), **Los Olmos** (13090001), and the
**Lower Rio Grande** (13090002). Federal hydrography and monitoring data are **US-only** and stop
at the international border; capturing the Mexican side of the basin is planned future work.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
## How to explore
Every map is live — **hover** for details, use the toolbar to **zoom and pan**, and **click legend
entries to toggle layers** on and off. Long data tables **scroll** within a fixed-height box (the
header stays pinned). Code is hidden by default; click **"Show code"** to reveal it.
:::

## The notebooks

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [1 · USGS Hydrography](notebooks/1_usgs_hydrography.html)
The **spatial foundation**: fetches the three HUC-8 **watershed boundaries** and maps them on an
interactive topographic basemap.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [2 · CONUS404 Climate](notebooks/2_usgs_climate.html)
Fetches **CONUS404** monthly climate output as a gridded datacube and derives the long-term
**water balance** (precipitation, ET, runoff, recharge) and **trends** — per watershed and per grid
cell — across the whole area, including the Mexican side.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [3 · USGS WaterData](notebooks/3_usgs_waterdata.html)
Discovers the **USGS monitoring stations**, records **which priority parameters** each measured,
and fetches the **time-series records** (daily values, discrete samples, field measurements) with a
data-availability summary.
:::

:::

---

Built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org); data from the USGS
[Water Data APIs](https://api.waterdata.usgs.gov) and the
[HyRiver](https://docs.hyriver.io/) toolset. Source on
[GitHub](https://github.com/LimnoTech/Thornforest).
